name: Escape of Mari: The Polar Ladybug
short_description: Help Mari, the ladybug, to get through the polar lands full of spiders and other obstacles. In this arcade game you need to be very precise with a mouse in order to get to the end of level.
detailed_description:
Mari is a ladybug and she needs you to escape from the polar lands. Control her with a mouse, she goes wherever you click left or right button. Touching any walls, stones or spiders kills you instantly. The game is difficult but fair thanks to a significant amount of checkpoints. You can collect in-game gold coins to unlock more levels!

Features

  • precise mouse control
  • fast-paced thrilling experience
  • you can skate on ice
  • you play as a ladybug
  • great for speedrunning

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Czech, Danish, Finnish, Greek, Spanish - Latin America, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Romanian, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Hungarian
*languages with full audio support
